user_prompt: Ready the psych-out grenade for cycling
prayer:

Initiate the cycling operation whilst murmuring binaric prayers of stability.
Verify the psych-out grenade's harmonious resonance through auspex invocation.

Conduct final diagnostics to affirm the kataphron destroyer's readiness.
